candidates.title: Corporate B2B Quote Website Build
candidates.tools: Premiere Pro · InDesign · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I need a WordPress-powered site that presents our merchandise and corporate-branding solutions in a catalogue style using WooCommerce, but without the standard cart or checkout. Every product page must lead visitors toward “Get a Quote” and a direct WhatsApp chat instead of “Add to Cart”. Design & branding The visual tone has to feel corporate and professional, matching the look of our existing logo and colour palette. While I don’t have a full brand guide, the colours and mark are set, so the theme and typography should revolve around them. Content structure The homepage should spotlight our Business Services range while still allowing visitors to explore Apparels & Accessories, Gifts, Events, Packaging & Containers, Textile–Apparel Clothing and Merchandise Trader collections through a clean filter or mega-menu. candidates.title: Luna AI Shopping Assistant Development
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I have the core SmartGuide AI Agent & Management Suite running—modern UI, admin dashboard, asynchronous API engine, and the Model Context Protocol server are already in place. What I now need is for you to bring the personalized shopping-assistance layer to life, with Luna—the enthusiastic smartphone advisor—as the primary conversational persona. Your mandate is to wire Luna into the existing stack so she can: • Offer context-aware product recommendations drawn from our smartphone catalogue • Query the live stock service in real time • Create and confirm customer booking reservations on the spot The conversational logic must leverage Generative AI with Retrieval-Augmented Generation; our product data, benchmark feeds, and availability endpoints are already exposed through a FastAPI gateway. You will design the prompt strategy, RAG pipeline, and any embedding or vector-store choices, then

candidates.title: E-Commerce Site & Marketing Materials
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: I’m ready to launch a new online store and need one reliable partner who can handle both the website build and key supporting graphics. Website scope: • Develop a modern, fully responsive e-commerce site that showcases a clear product catalog. • Integrate a secure payment gateway so customers can check out without friction. • Enable user reviews on each product page to build credibility and boost SEO. I’m after clean code, intuitive navigation, and fast load times. A familiar stack such as WordPress + WooCommerce, Shopify, or a comparable platform is fine—feel free to recommend what best suits a small-to-mid-sized catalog. Graphic design scope: Alongside the site, I need a cohesive set of promotional materials—think posters, web banners, and social-media graphics—that match the site’s look and feel and help drive traffic. What I’ll provide: • Branding guidelines, copy, and product photos

candidates.title: Flipkart and amazon Mattress Listing Setup
candidates.brief: I have a range of mattresses ready to go live on Flipkart and need someone who can turn the existing content into a fully-compliant, high-conversion listing. The product descriptions and a clean image set are already prepared; what I am missing are the detailed specifications that Flipkart requires—sizes, materials, firmness levels, certifications, weight, packaging dimensions, and anything else their catalogue team usually checks for approval. Your role is to: • Build the Flipkart catalogue entry for each mattress, entering every mandatory field and optional attribute that boosts search visibility. • Draft clear, accurate specs that match the product and are consistent across all SKUs. • Upload the images I provide in the correct resolutions and sequence. • Arrange the description, highlights, and key features so they read naturally and meet Flipkart’s content guidelines. candidates.title: Ingram-Ready PDF-to-EPUB
candidates.brief: I have a 54-page manuscript currently in Adobe PDF that must be rebuilt as a clean EPUB—not run through any automated converter—so it sails through IngramSpark’s validation checks. The cover file is finished; this task focuses solely on the interior. Tool choice is up to you (Adobe InDesign, Sigil, Calibre, or any workflow you trust) as long as the final package is fully accepted by IngramSpark. Core requirements • Re-set the entire text by hand, respecting standard paragraph, heading, and block-quote conventions—no custom fonts needed. • Embed all correct metadata (title, author, keywords, ISBN already assigned). • Create a functioning, internal, clickable table of contents; no other hyperlinks or media are required. • Run the file through IngramSpark’s validator and resolve any errors before delivery. candidates.title: Complete Shopify Store Design
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for layered/retouched assets and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: My Shopify catalogue is already uploaded and the photography is in place; what’s missing is a polished, modern-and-sleek interface that makes the store feel truly finished. I want the theme refined and the layout tightened up so every interaction feels effortless on desktop and mobile alike. Scope of work • Home page – build a strong hero, integrate a dynamic Featured Products section, and surface real Customer Reviews for social proof. • Product pages – clean typography, crisp image galleries, intuitive variant selection, and a persuasive, mobile-friendly add-to-cart flow. • Checkout page – style the experience so it stays on brand right through to payment, keeping performance and conversion best-practices in mind.
